sourcesContent:
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react'; type Page = 'home' | 'upload' | 'dashboard' | 'preview' | 'analytics' | 'profile'; type Project = { id: number; title: string; sourceLanguage: string; targetLanguages: string[]; status: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'completed'; stage: string; transcriptAccuracy: number; translationAccuracy: number; dubbingQuality: number; processingTime: number; }; const languages = [ { value: 'en', label: 'English' }, { value: 'fr', label: 'French' }, { value: 'es', label: 'Spanish' }, { value: 'de', label: 'German' }, { value: 'hi', label: 'Hindi' }, { value: 'ja', label: 'Japanese' }, ]; const sampleProjects: Project[] = [ { id: 1, title: 'Quarterly Product Demo', sourceLanguage: 'English', targetLanguages: ['French', 'Hindi'], status: 'processing', stage: 'Translating', transcriptAccuracy: 92, translationAccuracy: 88, dubbingQuality: 84, processingTime: 7, }, { id: 2, title: 'Founder Welcome Video', sourceLanguage: 'English', targetLanguages: ['Spanish', 'German', 'Japanese'], status: 'completed', stage: 'Completed', transcriptAccuracy: 95, translationAccuracy: 91, dubbingQuality: 89, processingTime: 12, }, ]; function App(): JSX.Element { const [page, setPage] = useState('home'); const [sourceLanguage, setSourceLanguage] = useState('en'); const [targetLanguages, setTargetLanguages] = useState(['fr']); const [selectedFileName, setSelectedFileName] = useState('No file selected'); const [selectedProjectId, setSelectedProjectId] = useState(sampleProjects[0].id); const selectedProject = useMemo( () => sampleProjects.find((project) => project.id === selectedProjectId) || sampleProjects[0], [selectedProjectId] ); const toggleLanguage = (languageCode: string) => { setTargetLanguages((current) => current.includes(languageCode) ? current.filter((item) => item !== languageCode) : [...current, languageCode] ); }; const navItems: { id: Page; label: string }[] = [ { id: 'home', label: 'Home' }, { id: 'upload', label: 'Upload' }, { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Processing' }, { id: 'preview', label: 'Preview' }, { id: 'analytics', label: 'Analytics' }, { id: 'profile', label: 'Profile' }, ]; return (

AI-Powered Video Localization

SpeakIt

{navItems.map((item) => ( ))}

Break language barriers with AI

Transcribe, translate, dub, and export localized videos in one workflow.

This frontend is now wired as a working React app, so `npm start` can launch properly on port 3000. The backend pipeline and API wiring can be connected next.

Transcribe
Translate
Dub

Upload

Source: {languages.find((item) => item.value === sourceLanguage)?.label}

Targets: {targetLanguages.map((item) => languages.find((lang) => lang.value === item)?.label).join(', ')}

File: {selectedFileName}

Live Status

{selectedProject.title}

{selectedProject.stage}

{page === 'home' && (

How it works

  1. Upload an English video and pick one or more target languages.
  2. Run AVLA to extract audio, transcribe, translate, dub, and merge.
  3. Preview the localized output, download the export, and review analytics.

Supported language pairs

  • English → French
  • English → Spanish
  • English → German
  • English → Hindi
  • English → Japanese
)} {page === 'upload' && (

Upload Video

Target languages
{languages .filter((language) => language.value !== 'en') .map((language) => ( ))}

What happens next

  • Audio extraction with MoviePy + FFmpeg
  • Speech-to-text with Whisper
  • Translation with MarianMT
  • Dubbing with gTTS or Coqui TTS
  • Final merge and export
)} {page === 'dashboard' && (

Your Projects

{sampleProjects.map((project) => ( ))}

Pipeline Stages

  • Extracting Audio
  • Transcribing
  • Translating
  • Dubbing
  • Merging

[00:01] Upload received and queued.

[00:08] Whisper base model started.

[00:22] MarianMT translating 2 segments.

[00:37] gTTS dubbing in progress.

)} {page === 'preview' && (

Preview & Export

Original / Localized Player Area

Transcript

Welcome to SpeakIt. This is a placeholder transcript area that will later show timed segments returned by Whisper.

)} {page === 'analytics' && (
Transcription Accuracy {selectedProject.transcriptAccuracy}%
Translation Fidelity {selectedProject.translationAccuracy}%
Dubbing Quality {selectedProject.dubbingQuality}%

Language Pair Scores

EN-FR
EN-ES
EN-HI

Processing Time

{selectedProject.processingTime} minutes for the selected project.

Activity

2 total projects, 1 completed, 1 processing.

)} {page === 'profile' && (

Profile

Name: Demo User

Email: demo@speakit.ai

Role: User

Feedback
